stemHtml: Near the North Pole, when using a direct-reading magnetic compass…

options.a: The magnetic compass indications are unreliable as it aligns with the vertical magnetic meridians.
options.b: True North and Magnetic North are in the same place/too close together to give an accurate reading.
options.c: The magnetic compass works accurately as it is not affected by proximity to the North Pole.
options.d: The magnetic compass readings are slightly skewed, but a skilled pilot can compensate for this.
